bbox-does-not-contain-geometry.parquet.violation: declared bbox [100,100,101,101] excludes all actual geometries (lon/lat 0-10)

crs-invalid-projjson.parquet.violation: crs value is JSON but missing required PROJJSON `type` field

crs-mismatch-schema-vs-geo-metadata.parq.violation: geo metadata declares EPSG:3857 but coordinates are CRS84 lon/lat

edges-spherical-with-planar-antimeridian.violation: edges=spherical declared but a planar LineString from -179 to 179 implies a line across the long way of the globe

epoch-on-unsupported-crs.parquet.violation: epoch set on EPSG:4326 (static datum) which does not support it

geo-invalid-json.parquet.violation: `geo` metadata bytes are not valid JSON (trailing comma)

geo-invalid-utf8.parquet.violation: `geo` metadata bytes contain invalid UTF-8 byte (0xFF)

geometry-types-mismatch-declared-point-a.violation: geometry_types declares ["Point"] but column contains LineStrings

geometry-types-missing-actual-type.parqu.violation: geometry_types declares ["Polygon"] but column also contains MultiPolygons

missing-geo-metadata.parquet.violation: no `geo` key in Parquet schema metadata

orientation-ccw-declared-rings-cw.parque.violation: orientation=counterclockwise declared but polygon rings are wound CW

primary-column-not-in-columns.parquet.violation: `primary_column` value does not appear as a key in `columns`

version-1-0-with-2-0-features.parquet.violation: version=1.0.0 declared but file uses 2.0-only epoch field

version-unknown.parquet.violation: version=99.0.0 is not a known GeoParquet version

wkb-truncated.parquet.violation: first row's WKB has 8 bytes chopped from the end

wkb-with-srid-prefix.parquet.violation: first row uses EWKB SRID prefix (not allowed in GeoParquet)

wkb-wrong-type-byte.parquet.violation: first row's WKB header declares LineString but body is a Point

zm-declared-xy-actual-xyz.parquet.violation: geometry_types=[Point] but rows are POINT Z

zm-declared-xyz-actual-xy.parquet.violation: geometry_types=[Point Z] but rows are 2D POINT
